meta.intent: Produce one instantly legible, high-stakes rescue beat with a hero puppy hanging over the flood and a clean route that reads in seconds even to a cold viewer.
meta.expectedPath: Clear the tempting left-side bait once, realize it does not finish the hero route, then open the central leash-side lane and save the spotlight puppy before pivoting to the safe secondary rescue.
meta.expectedFailMode: The player chases the obvious-looking bait side too long, the flood closes on the hero puppy, and the level loses its clean rescue moment.
meta.whatItProves: The game has a genuinely captureable rescue sequence that reads as rescue-order play rather than generic clearing.
meta.notes: The lower two flooded rows frame the hero puppy as the immediate story beat; blocker count stays intentionally light for capture readability.
